strengths: 15+ years across full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded systems
Current hands-on experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience leans toward Jest, Selenium, and custom D-language frameworks
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older and narrow

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of fullstack engineering with a current focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS, plus recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work that directly maps to the role's stack and AI requirements. Craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and a track record of architecture and teaching reinforce fit, though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly demonstrated and Kotlin/Java exposure is limited.
